subcodes.first_line: This is the Day whereon the Book walketh and speaketh. Blessed be they that hearken unto it! The banners of guidance have been raised aloft and shine forth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا یوم فیه الکتاب یمشی و ینطق طوبی للسامعین به ارتفعت اعلام الهدایه و انار
subcodes.subjects: @power of prayer, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
